# GLKMatrix3 | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ GLKit ](/documentation/glkit)

- [ GLKMatrix3 ](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl)

-  GLKMatrix3 

API Collection# GLKMatrix3

## [Overview](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Overview)

The `GLKMatrix3` type defines a `3x3` floating-point matrix as well as many mathematical operations commonly used to manipulate matrices. A `3x3` matrix is commonly used in graphics programming to represent scaling or rotation transformations to convert from one coordinate system to another.

The functions that manipulate `GLKMatrix3` structures treat the inputs as immutable, instead returning a new matrix that represent the results of the operation.

## [Topics](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#topics)

### [Creating Matrices](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Creating-Matrices)

[`func GLKMatrix3Make(Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3make(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix created from individual component values.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeAndTranspose(Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makeandtranspose(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` transposed matrix created from individual component values.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeWithArray(UnsafeMutablePointer<Float>!) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makewitharray(_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix created from an array of component values.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeWithArrayAndTranspose(UnsafeMutablePointer<Float>!) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makewitharrayandtranspose(_:))Returns a `3x3` transposed matrix created from an array of component values.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeWithColumns(GLKVector3, GLKVector3, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makewithcolumns(_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix created from three column vectors.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeWithRows(GLKVector3, GLKVector3, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makewithrows(_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix created from three row vectors.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeRotation(Float, Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makerotation(_:_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a rotation around an arbitrary vector.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeXRotation(Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makexrotation(_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a rotation around the positive x-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeYRotation(Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makeyrotation(_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a rotation around the positive y-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeZRotation(Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makezrotation(_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a rotation around the positive z-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeWithQuaternion(GLKQuaternion) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makewithquaternion(_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a rotation based on a quaternion.[`func GLKMatrix3MakeScale(Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3makescale(_:_:_:))Returns a `3x3` matrix that performs a scaling transformation.### [Working With Parts of a Matrix](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Working-With-Parts-of-a-Matrix)

[`func GLKMatrix3GetMatrix2(GLKMatrix3) -> GLKMatrix2`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3getmatrix2(_:))Returns the upper-left `2x2` section of a `3x3` matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3GetColumn(GLKMatrix3, Int32) -> GLKVector3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3getcolumn(_:_:))Retrieves a column from a `3x3` matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3GetRow(GLKMatrix3, Int32) -> GLKVector3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3getrow(_:_:))Retrieves a row from a `3x3` matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3SetColumn(GLKMatrix3, Int32, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3setcolumn(_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix with one column replaced by a new vector.[`func GLKMatrix3SetRow(GLKMatrix3, Int32, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3setrow(_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix with one row replaced by a new vector.### [Performing Mathematical Operations on Matrices](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Performing-Mathematical-Operations-on-Matrices)

[`func GLKMatrix3Invert(GLKMatrix3, UnsafeMutablePointer<Bool>!) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3invert(_:_:))Returns the inverse of a matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3Transpose(GLKMatrix3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3transpose(_:))Returns the transpose of a matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3InvertAndTranspose(GLKMatrix3, UnsafeMutablePointer<Bool>!) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3invertandtranspose(_:_:))Returns the inverse transpose of a matrix.[`func GLKMatrix3Multiply(GLKMatrix3, GLKMatrix3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3multiply(_:_:))Returns the product of two matrices.[`func GLKMatrix3Rotate(GLKMatrix3, Float, Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotate(_:_:_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3RotateWithVector3(GLKMatrix3, Float, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotatewithvector3(_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3RotateWithVector4(GLKMatrix3, Float, GLKVector4) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotatewithvector4(_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3RotateX(GLKMatrix3, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotatex(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around the x-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3RotateY(GLKMatrix3, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotatey(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around the y-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3RotateZ(GLKMatrix3, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3rotatez(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a rotation around the z-axis.[`func GLKMatrix3Scale(GLKMatrix3, Float, Float, Float) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3scale(_:_:_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a scaling transform.[`func GLKMatrix3ScaleWithVector3(GLKMatrix3, GLKVector3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3scalewithvector3(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a scaling transform defined by a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3ScaleWithVector4(GLKMatrix3, GLKVector4) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3scalewithvector4(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by concatenating a matrix with a scaling transform defined by a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3Add(GLKMatrix3, GLKMatrix3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3add(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by performing a component-wise addition of two matrices.[`func GLKMatrix3Subtract(GLKMatrix3, GLKMatrix3) -> GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3subtract(_:_:))Returns a new `3x3` matrix created by performing a component-wise subtraction of two matrices.### [Performing Mathematical Operations on Vectors](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Performing-Mathematical-Operations-on-Vectors)

[`func GLKMatrix3MultiplyVector3(GLKMatrix3, GLKVector3) -> GLKVector3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3multiplyvector3(_:_:))Multiplies a `3x3` matrix by a vector.[`func GLKMatrix3MultiplyVector3Array(GLKMatrix3, UnsafeMutablePointer<GLKVector3>, Int)`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3multiplyvector3array(_:_:_:))Multiplies a `3x3` matrix by an array of vectors.### [Data Types](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Data-Types)

[`typealias GLKMatrix2`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix2)A `2x2` matrix.[`typealias GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3)A `3x3` matrix stored in column-major order.### [Constants](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#Constants)

[`let GLKMatrix3Identity: GLKMatrix3`](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3identity)A `3x3` identity matrix.## [See Also](/documentation/glkit/glkmatrix3-pcl#see-also)
